prompt_text:
### Demographics: 59-year-old Asian man

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 15 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after preoperative labs showed elevated HbA1c
Current symptoms: Reports 1-2 mild hypoglycemia episodes per month (self-resolved); no DKA/HHS signs

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 4 (15-29)
Heart failure: HFrEF (NYHA Class II)
Body mass index category: Obese Class I
Diabetic neuropathy
Diabetic Peripheral Neuropathy
Diabetic Foot Ulcer / High-Risk Foot
Recurrent Complicated Urinary Tract Infections
Major Depressive Disorder
Urolithiasis (status post lithotripsy)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 4 (15-29); HF: HFrEF (NYHA Class II); ASCVD (No); MASLD: Normal; BMI Category: Obese Class I
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (mother)
- Social history: Former smoker (quit 5 years ago; 20 cigarettes/day for 10 years; ~10 pack-years); Alcohol 1-2 drinks/week

### Medication information
- Current medications: Glimepiride 2mg once daily; Duloxetine (60 mg daily), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Losartan (50 mg daily), Ciprofloxacin (500 mg twice daily for 7 days)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 83.5 kg; Height 181.3 cm; BMI 25.4 kg/m²; Blood pressure 140/75 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 9.9%; 9 months ago 9.5%; 6 months ago 9.0%; 3 months ago 8.5%; current 8.2%), FPG (12 months ago 238mg/dL; 9 months ago 258mg/dL; 6 months ago 222mg/dL; 3 months ago 212mg/dL; current 190mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 85.8kg; 9 months ago 81.2kg; 6 months ago 81.7kg; 3 months ago 79.7kg; current 83.5kg), Height (12 months ago 181.3cm; 9 months ago 181.3cm; 6 months ago 181.3cm; 3 months ago 181.3cm; current 181.3cm), BMI (12 months ago 26.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 25.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 25.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 24.0kg/m²; current 25.4kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 137mmHg; 9 months ago 136mmHg; 6 months ago 139mmHg; 3 months ago 141mmHg; current 140mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 74mmHg; 9 months ago 76mmHg; 6 months ago 74mmHg; 3 months ago 75mmHg; current 75mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 23U/L; 9 months ago 16U/L; 6 months ago 14U/L; 3 months ago 24U/L; current 19U/L), AST (12 months ago 26U/L; 9 months ago 18U/L; 6 months ago 20U/L; 3 months ago 21U/L; current 24U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.2mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.3mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.3mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.2mg/dL; current 0.3mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 25mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 20mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 22mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 20mL/min/1.73m²; current 18mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 765mg/g; 9 months ago 879mg/g; 6 months ago 655mg/g; 3 months ago 758mg/g; current 971mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 94mg/dL; 9 months ago 94mg/dL; 6 months ago 100mg/dL; 3 months ago 94mg/dL; current 97mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 40mg/dL; 9 months ago 40mg/dL; 6 months ago 43mg/dL; 3 months ago 39mg/dL; current 41mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 131mg/dL; 9 months ago 145mg/dL; 6 months ago 130mg/dL; 3 months ago 131mg/dL; current 137mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 12.0g/dL; 9 months ago 12.8g/dL; 6 months ago 12.1g/dL; 3 months ago 12.0g/dL; current 12.1g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide 1.47 ng/mL (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Moderate adherence (estimated 70-90%); SMBG 1-3 times/week; lifestyle control inconsistent.
Financial context: Patient has standard insurance with moderate copays and a monthly medication budget of ≤ KRW 500,000.
